marlbot SSL

Absolutely insane bot. Went from C1 to GC in 3 weeks using the training routines. The aerial mechanics training is next level.

Best investment I've made for RL. The bot actually adapts to my playstyle and pushes me to improve. Worth every penny.

marlbot SSL
2 weeks ago

As an SSL player, I was skeptical. But marlbot actually provides decent training partners. The team coordination mode is clutch.

Great for learning mechanics. Sometimes the bot is too good for my level but that's good motivation I guess!
